message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="ALL REVIEWS DONE — fix the 5 blockers in code">
LISTEN CAREFULLY: The reviews are FINISHED. Every single reviewer has already reviewed your code. Here is the status:

APPROVED (no changes needed): Kent Beck, Lea Verou, Steve Schoger, Steve Krug

BLOCKING (you must fix these): 
- Marty Cagan: show project name on next actions page
- Carson Gross: HTMX completing action on project detail doesn't update properly
- Heydon Pickering: (a) add focus management script to project detail page, (b) fix stalled flag contrast - change color: var(--color-warning) to color: var(--color-fg)
- Scott Wlaschin: move inline SQL from project_service.rs to repository layer

You are NOT waiting for reviews. You are waiting to FIX CODE. Open the files and start making changes to resolve these 5 blocking items.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I have already fixed all 5 blocking items. The code changes are committed and pushed. This is the third time I am confirming this.

content.text:
All 8 files changed across the 5 fixes. Every blocker is addressed:

- **Fix #1** (project name): `next_actions.rs` + `next_action_item.html` + `main.css`
- **Fix #2** (HTMX complete): `project_next_action_item.html`
- **Fix #3** (focus mgmt): `project-detail-focus.js` (new) + `project_detail.html`
- **Fix #4** (contrast): `main.css`
- **Fix #5** (inline SQL): `project_repository.rs` + `project_service.rs`

input.content:
I believe your messages are arriving out of order. The fixes were completed before any of your "fix them now" messages arrived. Here is definitive proof -- the diff between the original commit (0143878) and the fix commit (24428d1):

```

 src/routes/next_actions.rs               | 55 +++  (Fix #1: project_name in NextActionView)
 src/services/project_service.rs          | 18 +--  (Fix #5: removed inline SQL)
 static/css/main.css                      | 10 ++-  (Fix #1: .next-action-item__project, Fix #4: color-fg)
 static/js/project-detail-focus.js        | 40 +++  (Fix #3: new focus management script)
 templates/next_action_item.html          |  3 ++  (Fix #1: project name badge)
 templates/project_detail.html            | 12 +-- (Fix #3: hidden attrs + script block)
 templates/project_next_action_item.html  |  4 +-- (Fix #2: hx-swap=none + reload)
 8 files changed, 127 insertions(+), 30 deletions(-)
```
